title: Develop a horticultural production plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a horticultural production plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out planning activities

pcs.text: Determine client preferences and requirements for the production plan, and confirm according to workplace marketing strategy and business plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine client preferences and requirements for the production plan, and confirm according to workplace marketing strategy and business plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine client preferences and requirements for the production plan, and confirm according to workplace marketing strategy and business plans.

pcs.text: Assess the production site for growing environment factors, services and site modifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the production site for growing environment factors, services and site modifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the production site for growing environment factors, services and site modifications.

pcs.text: Conduct research into the growing requirements of plant species and cultivars, and restrictions that may affect the production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct research into the growing requirements of plant species and cultivars, and restrictions that may affect the production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct research into the growing requirements of plant species and cultivars, and restrictions that may affect the production plan.

pcs.text: Identify sustainable land use issues that may affect planned production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sustainable land use issues that may affect planned production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sustainable land use issues that may affect planned production.

pcs.text: Set production targets that are consistent with the marketing strategy and business plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set production targets that are consistent with the marketing strategy and business plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set production targets that are consistent with the marketing strategy and business plan.

pcs.text: Determine production requirements in terms of quantity, quality and availability of the product
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine production requirements in terms of quantity, quality and availability of the product?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine production requirements in terms of quantity, quality and availability of the product.

pcs.text: Develop a draft plan that reflects client preferences and requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a draft plan that reflects client preferences and requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a draft plan that reflects client preferences and requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out planning activities

elements.title: Determine the requirements of horticultural production

pcs.text: Identify plant species that are appropriate to the site and consistent with the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify plant species that are appropriate to the site and consistent with the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify plant species that are appropriate to the site and consistent with the plan.

pcs.text: Calculate, cost and confirm availability and quantity required with the supplier
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate, cost and confirm availability and quantity required with the supplier?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate, cost and confirm availability and quantity required with the supplier.

pcs.text: Select plant establishment procedures consistent with the agreed preliminary plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select plant establishment procedures consistent with the agreed preliminary plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select plant establishment procedures consistent with the agreed preliminary plan.

pcs.text: Ensure design of the site includes irrigation and drainage systems, and takes into account the growing requirements of plants and sustainable land use practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure design of the site includes irrigation and drainage systems, and takes into account the growing requirements of plants and sustainable land use practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure design of the site includes irrigation and drainage systems, and takes into account the growing requirements of plants and sustainable land use practices.

pcs.text: Document cultural management practices to achieve optimal growth environment from planting to harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document cultural management practices to achieve optimal growth environment from planting to harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document cultural management practices to achieve optimal growth environment from planting to harvest.

pcs.text: Determine harvesting dates to meet market specifications and deadlines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine harvesting dates to meet market specifications and deadlines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine harvesting dates to meet market specifications and deadlines.

pcs.text: Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for production and site establishment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for production and site establishment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for production and site establishment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine the requirements of horticultural production

elements.title: Schedule production activities

pcs.text: Outline staged implementation and development of the crop production activities, including providing for future works access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline staged implementation and development of the crop production activities, including providing for future works access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline staged implementation and development of the crop production activities, including providing for future works access.

pcs.text: Determine and document timelines for crop production activities, taking into account any other planning requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and document timelines for crop production activities, taking into account any other planning requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and document timelines for crop production activities, taking into account any other planning requirements.

pcs.text: Plan and schedule marketing according to the production schedule and marketing strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and schedule marketing according to the production schedule and marketing strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and schedule marketing according to the production schedule and marketing strategy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Schedule production activities

elements.title: Plan monitoring of the production plan

pcs.text: Determine production activities to be monitored, the format for recording factors, frequency of monitoring and the thresholds for remedial action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine production activities to be monitored, the format for recording factors, frequency of monitoring and the thresholds for remedial action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine production activities to be monitored, the format for recording factors, frequency of monitoring and the thresholds for remedial action.

pcs.text: Document required remedial or contingency plan for implementation by staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document required remedial or contingency plan for implementation by staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document required remedial or contingency plan for implementation by staff.

pcs.text: Review on a regular basis the effectiveness of the monitoring system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review on a regular basis the effectiveness of the monitoring system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review on a regular basis the effectiveness of the monitoring system.

pcs.text: Compare the production program with feedback and projections from clients
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare the production program with feedback and projections from clients?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare the production program with feedback and projections from clients.

pcs.text: Implement remedial action or contingency plan where crop production falls outside client projections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement remedial action or contingency plan where crop production falls outside client projections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement remedial action or contingency plan where crop production falls outside client projections.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Plan monitoring of the production plan

elements.title: Prepare and document the production plan and specifications

pcs.text: Prepare detailed plans, specifications and quotations based on horticultural conventions and the requirements of production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare detailed plans, specifications and quotations based on horticultural conventions and the requirements of production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare detailed plans, specifications and quotations based on horticultural conventions and the requirements of production.

pcs.text: Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for crop production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for crop production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for crop production.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Prepare and document the production plan and specifications

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
